name: layer-error-events-london
description: Wire readyEvent and errorEvent listeners on a working imagery layer while still rendering a visible map over London.
prompt: Create a CesiumJS viewer centered on London using a working imagery layer, and explicitly wire both layer.errorEvent and provider.errorEvent listeners using the readyEvent pattern described in the skill. The final scene should still render a normal visible map over London, but the code must clearly show the error-handling wiring.
expected_behaviors: Creates an imagery layer from an async provider
visual_expectations: A normal visible map over London. The event listeners are not directly visible, so the visual test mainly confirms the scene still renders correctly.

screenshots.description: London map with event wiring in code
